feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAPScript Next Page first line contains wrong data
entry.content:
I'm having a weird issue with a invoice sapscript i've been working on.  It has this weird issue where the first line on the NEXT pages (any page after the first) sometimes has the wrong data.  In my case it's replacing the total price with the total of the entire invoice.  While debugging, it seems to start the line (line number, material, amount, uom) then it determines it needs to goto the NEXT Page due to it leaving the main box and finishes other windows on FIRST before going to the NEXT PAGE and finishing the rest of the item.  The value that is wrong is where the program leaves off (after UOM) on the First page.  For the life of me I can't figure out where or how it's grabbing the TOTAL value of the entire invoice.  It doesn't even call it in the MAIN window.  Any Ideas?  After some extensive searches,  it seems like one other person ran into something similar but never got an answer here.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/wrong-values-in-second-page/qaq-p/3417880

entry.title: cannot change ABAP program
entry.content:
Hi there:

This standard ABAP I cannot change even I change mode, Pls advise.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SFW5 how to inactivate
entry.content:
Hi expert:

how to inactivate this business function EA-DFP ?

Pls advise.

entry.title: Issue while implementing SAP Note 3501652
entry.content:
Hi,

In transaction code BIC2, in File structure dropdown the key "Identifiers Directory" is not showing in our system So when try to check two SAP OSS notes (338821 and 3501652) to implemented. We have  successfully implemented the note 338821 but we are unable to implement note 3501652 which has two prerequisite notes (3278821 and 3345223). In prerequisite notes we are able to implement 3278821 note but we couldn't implement note 3345223 as it shows that "Note can not be implemented". 

Someone please let us know how can we implement these note(3342223) for our support package as shown below

entry.title: create source list ME01 using IDOC/other methods in abap report
entry.content:
i want to create update and delete source list in me01.

i have used DMC_MIG_SOURCE_LIST but its not fulfilling my purpose. 
Is there any other way to create it like idoc or bapi ?

entry.title: In SAP CDS Views, the global search functionality is not working for calculated or derived fields.
entry.content:
In SAP CDS Views, the global search functionality is not working for calculated or derived fields.

We have added the annotation @search.searchable:true at the header level and @search.defaultSearchElement at the derived/calculated field level. Additionally, we attempted to separate the calculation field into a view entity and integrated it with another root entity where the search is applied. However, this approach also did not resolve the issue.

The system is throwing a dump with the error TRIGGER_DATABASE_FAILURE_DUMP.

Could you please advise if there is any workaround to make the global search work for calculated or derived fields in CDS views?

entry.title: Fiori where to set default ADAPT FILTERs field
entry.content:
Hi Expert

 

every time I need to click ADAPT FILTERS and add new field. 

Is there any menu where I can set default ADAPT FILTERS field?

pls advise.

THanks in advanceabap

entry.title: Fiori set default view settings
entry.content:
Hi Expert;

 

To change layout of field display on screen on VIEW SETTINGS icon. how to set default for this?

pls advise.

entry.title: Fiori add APP Purchasing Requisition average approval time
entry.content:
Hi expert:

I would like to add APP "Purchasing Requisition average approval time" to my user.

But I cannot find in catalog.

Pls advise steps.

THanks in advance.

abap

entry.title: To generate a QR code in SAP ABAP that includes special characters
entry.content: I am creating a program in SAP using Adobe Forms and a QR code generator. I have the following code: 0106933265514620215-&RWoH3Y-.Tk91FFD092dGVzdApr7bADFkbQnxVk86w/obSPK=QDQDQ. I want to display this code in a QR code, but I encountered an issue where special characters are being replaced with a # sign instead of the ASCII Group Separator. How can I generate the QR code correctly in SAP ABAP?

entry.title: BAPI or function module to delete technical objects from contract
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone know BAPI of FM to delete technical objects from service contact? There are over 45K objects and deleting hundreds of them manually is not an option. Need to create program to do that. 

Our old program uses VA42 via batch input, but that is way too slow.

Br,

Pekka

entry.title: Fiori data source how to view
entry.content:
HI Expert: 

Pls advise how to view the data in data source in Fiori pls?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Data not updated in CDS view
entry.content:
Hi Expert: 

 

I have created 1 purchase requisition on t.code ME51n. 

But it 's not updated on this CDS view C_REQNAVGAPPROVALTIME.

my PR already approved!

Where to check for this?

 

Pls advise.

 

@Sandra_Rossi 

@veronika_skybova

entry.title: where to create new Relative DATE FUNCTION
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

I see this parameter in Fiori report.

How to create new Relative DATE FUNCTION pls? for example from 2020 until today.

CDS view is C_REQNAVGAPPROVALTIME

Pls advise

entry.title: How to perform the Unit Test where the product code is made to read the data from the SAP Table?
entry.content:
I have the product code stored in the Class called ZUKI_ABC. Inside this class, there is a method called 'READ'. This READ method is responsible to read the Data from the SAP Table. 

Now I created the Local Test Class for performing a Unit Testing. But I want to know How can I write my Testing Methods to verify the results. Another question is, what Input data and expected data should I consider to verify the product code and its expected results?

entry.title: Using a BAPI or functional module to add a catalog to a single role
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a task to create many roles (T-Code: PFCG) but need to do so using ABAP (using eclipse for the editor). The creation of roles is fine (using FM: PRGN_STRU_SAVE_DEFINITION) but the problem is I cannot find anything to add a Fiori launchpad catalog to the role created. The task requires that it is automated and so I cannot go into PFCG and add the catalog manually.

I have tried to work around this by using a recording but this also seems to not work.

So, is there a BAPI or functional module to add a catalog to a single role. If not, is there another option I have missed?

Sorry if this question has already been asked, I have not been able to find it.

Thanks

entry.title: How to flag deletion indicator as 'X' for line item of "Purchase Requestion"
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to flag the deletion indicator (EBAN-LOEKZ) as 'X' for the line item of Purchase Requestion.

I've used FM "BAPI_REQUISITION_DELETE" in one report, but it is not working properly. It is throwing me an error - " 06269 : This item can only be deleted via the associated sales document "
(When i debugged the BAPI i found that at one line debugger is not going on this perform  "PERFORM requisition_delete TABLES xeban "  because of "EXIT" keyword used.)

I have already see many threads on internet, but not working.

I want any solution that would update the EBAN-LOEKZ as 'X' by using any function module, or any other way.

entry.title: cl_gui_frontend_service=>file_save_dialog not supported by fiori tile
entry.content:
Hello team,

I have created a program in which I have used cl_gui_frontend_service=>file_save_dialog to get the local system file path where user can chose and save file. Then I have created a FIORI tile for this program Transaction code(T.code). This functionality is working absolutely fine while called in SAP GUI. But while I am calling this from fiori tile the Method file_save_dialog not working. 

My requirement is to get the desktop file path by choosing and save a file in that chosen folder. Can you suggest me what FM or Method I can use in backend program to get the file save dialog which would support HTML calling from FIORI as well?

Note- F4_FILENAME is not working.

Regards

Tapas

entry.title: In SAP suddenly for all the customers are started to get the old invoice documents via email
entry.content: In SAP suddenly for all the customers are started to get the old past 3 years old billing invoice documents via email.

entry.title: Is there a way to detect whether a BAPI is for read or write through metadata?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there any bapi attribute or any other details in the BAPI metadata that can be used to determine if the BAPI is for read or write?

BAPI_USER_GETLIST - reads list of all users - so a read bapi

BAPI_PO_CREATE1 - creates a purchase order - so a write bapi

BAPI_USER_LOCK - changes state of a user to locked - a write bapi

Note: NWRFCSDK is being used for fetching BAPI metadata and other details

Thanks.
